label: Price Chart
description: Candlestick and line chart with technical indicators, volume, and timeframe controls for the selected instrument.

0.4.note: Replaced as-never casts with typed assertions (candleData as Array<{time,open,high,low,close,volume?}> and indicatorOverlays as unknown as IndicatorOverlay[]).

0.5.note: No lib/mocks imports in widget file.

0.7.note: candleData.length===0 guard renders instrument-specific empty message.

0.8.note: error guard renders rose-400 error text.

l0.notes: All L0 checks pass. Previously fixed: as-never casts and empty-state guard.

1.3.note: Price chart shows per-instrument market data — not org-filtered.

1.5.note: Instrument selection is strategy-driven but chart data itself is per-instrument market data.

1.6.note: Empty scope shows default instrument chart.

1.7.note: TIMEFRAMES and INDICATORS are widget-local constants (appropriate — UI config not reference data).

l1.notes: L1 pass. 1.3/1.4/1.5 N/A — instrument-level market data.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab and f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Modes: live ✓ (live candle updates at 500ms), batch ✓ (useCandles passes asOf param for historical OHLCV), paper N/A.

3.2.note: use-terminal-page-data.ts reads context.mode; modeParam/asOfParam passed to useCandles(). Batch mode delivers historical OHLCV via REST.

3.5.note: Paper mode expected: same as live (read-only chart). No behavioral change needed.

3.6.note: 500ms liveCandle tick interval runs always but only affects mock-mode display. WebSocket for price updates disabled when mode!=='live'.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human checks 3.3(N/A—chart is read-only)/3.4(batch indicator visible on instrument-bar) required.

4.1.note: Chart type toggle (Candles/Line) and indicator/timeframe buttons all have onClick handlers wired to setChartType/toggleIndicator/setTimeframe. No dead buttons.

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

l4.notes: All agent checks pass. Human checks 4.3(N/A—no form)/4.4(chart switches correctly)/4.7(N/A—no tabs, uses Buttons)/4.8(chart scrolls within bounds) required.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all — price chart is universal market data widget. Supports all strategy types through instrument selection.

l6.notes: Deferred — L6 follows L5 human sign-off.

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb/hsl in widget file (indicator colors are in use-terminal-page-data.ts, not in widget). CLEAN.

7.4.note: PascalCase component, useCamelCase hook, kebab-case file. CLEAN.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file. CLEAN.

l7.notes: L7 pass. All mechanical checks clean.

8.1.note: text-[10px] → text-micro at line 60; text-[9px] → text-nano at lines 73, 85. Tokens now available in globals.css @theme.

8.3.note: Uses Card, CardContent, CardHeader, Button from components/ui/*. CLEAN.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt, no input, no interactive div without role. Human: keyboard-only pass on timeframe/indicator button bar required.

8.5.note: Human check required — responsive at minW=3, minH=2.

keepSeparate.rationale: Price chart requires full widget space for LightweightCharts canvas; cannot be merged with order book or order entry without breaking the layout architecture.

relationships.notes: Driven by selectedInstrument from instrument-bar. Chart type/timeframe/indicator state is local to this widget.

dataContract.notes: OHLCV data via useCandles() REST hook; 500ms mock price tick merges into live candle for real-time feel. Historical batch mode delivers static snapshot via asOf param.

gaps: Timeframe mapping 4H/1D not passed to useCandles (maps to '1H' — see line 276)
DeFi on-chain price feeds not verified
coverage.notes: Known gap: timeframe '4H' and '1D' both map to '1H' API param in useTerminalPageData. Candle resolution may be wrong for longer timeframes.

knownIssues: TerminalData types candleData and indicatorOverlays as Array<Record<string,unknown>> — double-cast in widget needed
4H and 1D timeframes both map to '1H' in useCandles call — candle resolution gap

findings.description: price-chart-widget.tsx — user-visible strings not i18n wrapped
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: price-chart-widget.tsx:60 — text-[10px]; :73,85 — text-[9px] arbitrary typography classes with no matching globals.css token
findings.deferReason: missing token — requests --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) and --text-nano (0.5625rem/9px) for dense trading control bar labels
findings.fix: globals.css @theme now exposes --text-micro and --text-nano; widget updated to text-micro at line 60 and text-nano at lines 73, 85.
